seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Rhythm, AR Rahman, Unni Menon, Nadhiye Nadhiye full lyrics, Rhythm songs lyrics, Nadhiye Nadhiye lyrics snippets, Nadhiye Nadhiye WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Nadhiye Nadhiye lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nadhiye Nadhiye'?

The song 'Nadhiye Nadhiye' expresses deep romantic feelings, portraying love as a flowing river, symbolizing its beauty and continuity.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Rhythm'?

In Rhythm, this song highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters, showcasing their emotional connection and longing.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Unni Menon and composed by AR Rahman, known for his innovative musical style.

When was 'Nadhiye Nadhiye' released?

'Nadhiye Nadhiye' was released on September 15, 2000, as part of the movie Rhythm.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Nadhiye Nadhiye', the protagonist expresses profound love and longing, encapsulated in the flowing imagery of rivers. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an atmosphere of romance and intimacy. As part of the movie Rhythm, it serves as a pivotal moment that deepens the emotional connection between the characters. The combination of Unni Menon's voice and AR Rahman's composition makes this song a cherished favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nadhiye Nadhiye from Rhythm is a mesmerizing romantic ballad that beautifully captures the essence of love. With Unni Menon's soulful vocals and AR Rahman's enchanting composition, this song transports listeners to a world of emotions. The poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu add depth, making it a timeless classic that resonates with lovers everywhere.
stanzaMeanings: theem thanana theem thananaa theem thanana theem thananaa theem thanana theem thananaa thiranaa
River, river, love river, you too are a river, oh you too are a river.
If one or two reasons are given, I will tell you; if you say something, I will tell you.
theem thanana theem thananaa theem thanana theem thananaa theem thanana theem thananaa thiranaa
When it flows, it rises; when it stops, it becomes a waterfall, isn't it?
When it mixes, the maiden becomes a wife, isn't it?
Small rivers, flowing rivers, merging rivers, in those rivers, her face...
On the day it ends, the shore will be filled with music, in the melody of 'jill jill'.
The Ganges comes, the Yamuna comes, the Vaigai comes, the Porunai comes, in the flow of 'jal jal jal'.
The beauty of the lover is in the separation, the beauty of the wife is in the union, the beauty of the rain is in the knowledge of the season.
When shame comes, the words will flow, and when the fingers touch, the water will melt, and the woman will become one.
We are born in the water, oh ho, we end in the water, oh ho.
theem thanana theem thananaa theem thanana theem thananaa theem thanana theem thananaa thiranaa
Colorful, colorful girl, round, round river, your beauty is lovely, your beauty is lovely.
Oh, when the melodies are sung, the waves hide, the river's quality is the same as that of the girl.
Small rivers, flowing rivers, merging rivers, in those rivers, her face...
On the day it ends, the shore will be filled with music, in the melody of ...
The Ganges comes, the Yamuna comes, the Vaigai comes, the Porunai comes, ...
theem thanana theem thananaa theem thanana theem thananaa theem thanana theem thananaa thiranaa
In the sweet garden, in the flowers, like honey, in the cow, the water will flow.
Mother, be like a mother, be like a leader, be like a daughter, oh girl, become a mother.
In the flower, in the flower, the woman will change forms.
When water is thought of, when a girl is thought of, all hands will merge and go away.
River, river, love river, you too are a river, oh you too are a river.
If one or two reasons are given, I will tell you; if you say something, I will tell you.
